prompt: Our receipt renderer runs in a worker that handles a few email jobs concurrently, and every so often a customer gets a receipt with someone ELSE'S line items on it — support escalated one where a €399.00 standing desk showed up on a $58.50 stationery order, with a garbled total to match. I cannot reproduce it serially, only under overlap. test_renderer.ts nails it with two overlapping renders (`node --test test_renderer.ts`). Fix renderer.ts and keep the tests exactly as they are.
